title: Alliant Energy CEO John Larsen to Become Executive Chairman, Lisa Barton Named CEO
text: MADISON, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) announced today that its board of directors elected John Larsen, current board chair and CEO, to the position of executive chairman, effective January 1, 2024. In addition, Lisa Barton has been elected CEO of Alliant Energy and a member of the board of directors effective January 1, 2024. "Lisa is an outstanding leader, with a track record of driving strategic outcomes, making her uniquely qualified to take on the CEO role during this.

title: Analysts Estimate Alliant Energy (LNT) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Alliant Energy (LNT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Alliant Energy Corporation declares quarterly common stock dividend
text: MADISON, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.4525 per share payable on November 15, 2023, to shareowners of record as of the close of business on October 31, 2023. Dividends on common stock have been paid for 312 consecutive quarters since 1946. Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) provides regulated energy service to 995,000 electric and 425,000 natural gas customers across Iowa and Wisconsin.

title: Alliant Energy Corporation Announces Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: MADISON, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) has scheduled its third quarter 2023 earnings release for Thursday, November 2nd, after market close. A conference call to review the third quarter results is scheduled for Friday, November 3 at 9 a.m. CT. Alliant Energy will webcast the event live at www.alliantenergy.com/investors. The call is open to the public and will be hosted by John Larsen, Board Chair and CEO, Lisa Barton, President and COO and Robert Durian, Exec.

title: Why Safe Haven Utilities Stocks Are Having Their Worst Year Since 2008
text: Electric utility stocks used to be an income investor's best friend, but dividend growth cuts and rising Treasury yields have turned these rocksteady investments into market pariahs.

title: Newsweek names Alliant Energy on its inaugural World's Most Trustworthy Companies list
text: MADISON, Wis.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Newsweek named Alliant Energy (NASDAQ: LNT) on its Inaugural list of the World's Most Trustworthy Companies for 2023. Newsweek and Statista, an independent data research firm, identified the companies on the list through a survey that covered 23 industries in 21 countries. They asked over 70,000 participants around the world to evaluate statements such as, "I trust in this company to treat me fairly as its customer," "I trust that this company is competently led,.
